demographic_profile.summary: These are experienced logistics professionals working at major shipping, freight, and distribution companies who make data-driven operational decisions daily. They prioritize practical solutions that improve efficiency, ensure compliance, and integrate with existing technology systems. Their frustrations center around outdated processes, poor data integration, safety compliance complexity, and solutions that don't scale with enterprise-level operations.
